adventure_overview: The most popular events in Cub Scouting are found in this Adventure, the Pinewood Derby® and the Raingutter Regatta™. Tigers and adult partners work together to build and race either a car or boat. Prior to any activity, use Scouting America SAFE Checklist to ensure the safety of all those involved. All participants in official Scouting America activities should become familiar with the Guide to Safe Scouting and applicable program literature or manuals.

requirements.text: With your Tiger adult partner, assemble and decorate either a Pinewood Derby® car or a Raingutter Regatta™ boat.

content.value: With your Tiger adult partner, assemble and decorate either a Pinewood Derby® car or a Raingutter Regatta™ boat.

activities.name: Pinewood Derby® Car Build Day Tiger
activities.description: Den or pack provides a build day for Cub Scouts.

activities.name: Raingutter Regatta™ Boat Build Day Tiger
activities.description: Den or pack provides a build day for Cub Scouts.

requirements.text: Learn the rules of the race for the vehicle chosen in requirement 1.

content.value: Learn the rules of the race for the vehicle chosen in requirement 1.

activities.name: Race Memory Tiger
activities.description: Memory Game using Pinewood Derby® or Raingutter Regatta™ Rules

activities.name: Race Ready Or Not Sorting Game
activities.description: Cub Scouts will recognize behaviors that follow race rules by completing a sorting activity.

activities.name: Rule or Not a Rule
activities.description: Cub Scouts determine if statements are rules or not rules.

requirements.text: Before the race, discuss with your Tiger adult partner how you will demonstrate good sportsmanship during the race.

content.value: Before the race, discuss with your Tiger adult partner how you will demonstrate good sportsmanship during the race.

activities.name: Act Like a Good Sport Tiger
activities.description: Cub Scouts will act out through role playing how to be a good sport during the race

activities.name: My Race Day Promise
activities.description: Cub Scouts will plan what they will say to situations on race day.

activities.name: Race Pledge
activities.description: Cub Scouts will commit to demonstrating sportsmanship.

requirements.text: With your Tiger adult partner, participate in a Pinewood Derby® or a Raingutter Regatta™.

content.value: With your Tiger adult partner, participate in a Pinewood Derby® or a Raingutter Regatta™.

activities.name: Pinewood Derby® Race Tiger
activities.description: Conduct a Pinewood Derby® car race.
